历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7501 → 9522 → 15415 → 11767 → 12353. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (15415), rebounding to 11767 in 2024, and a slight backward shift to 12353 in 2025, with considerable fluctuations in the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 12353. The enrollment plan for this university in Henan Province for Physics Category was 253 in 2021, 236 in 2022, 240 in 2023, 247 in 2024, and 250 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 230, a reduction of 20 students (-8%) compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment usually eases competition slightly, leading to a smaller ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is 22nd, with a stable ranking of 21–22 in recent years, placing it among the top universities nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to the ongoing impact of the 2019 companion incident. Douyin popularity ranking is 20th (high heat), with significant short video exposure and high application attention. Abnormal signals such as the 2022 Shaanxi enrollment gap and the significant decline in the ranking of Journalism and Communication majors in 2023 have attracted attention. It has 19 A- or above disciplines, including Mathematics A+ (top in the country), Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, and Marxist Theory A, with strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended, highly matching Shandong University's advantageous engineering and medical disciplines. The total number of candidates in Henan Province in 2026 is approximately 1.2 million (significantly increased from about 907,000 in 2025), intensifying competition. Shandong University is located in the neighboring province of Shandong, which has strong regional appeal to Henan candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Henan is about 6.6% (2025), making it a 985 university with a relatively large enrollment scale outside its province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12353, the 8% enrollment reduction in 2026, the significant increase in Henan candidates (intensifying competition), the slightly negative reputation but undiminished attention, the ranking advancement effect from enrollment reduction is partially offset by the intensified competition from increased candidates. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11810, with a range of 11310–12310.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，综合实力雄厚。其医学学科历史悠久，齐鲁医学院在国内外享有较高声誉，临床医学、口 腔医学等专业长期受到考生青睐。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续攀升，临床医学（5+3一体化、齐鲁医学堂）、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。山东省与河南省地理位置相邻，文化相近，山东大学对河南考 生具有较强吸引力。2026年医学类大幅扩招至64人，为更多考生提供了报考机会，但热门专业录取位次仍将保持高位。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型与历年医学位次趋势，预测2026年山东大学在河南省医学类最低录取位次约为42619名，波动区间为42119—43119名。2026年大幅扩招使位次较2025年有所扩 大，但医学持续高热使扩招效应被部分抵消，位次不会完全回落到扩招前的低位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Shandong University conducts separate enrollment for medical programs in Henan Province. From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were 7501, 7490, 13053, 11363, and 31705 respectively. In 2021–2022, the rankings remained stable around 7500, jumped to 13053 in 2023, slightly dropped to 11363 in 2024, and surged again to 31705 in 2025, showing a significant upward trend overall. Regarding enrollment plans, the total number of medical program slots remained stable at 40 from 2021 to 2025, but in 2026, it will expand substantially to 64 (a 60% increase), which will effectively alleviate competition pressure and cause the ranking numbers to expand.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, ranked among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with strong comprehensive strength. Its medical disciplines have a long history, and Qilu Medical College enjoys a high reputation both domestically and internationally. Programs such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have long been favored by candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has continued to rise, with core programs such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program, Qilu Medical Hall) and Stomatology facing particularly intense competition. Shandong Province and Henan Province are geographically adjacent with similar cultures, making Shandong University highly attractive to Henan candidates. In 2026, the substantial expansion of medical programs to 64 slots provides more opportunities for candidates, but the admission rankings for popular programs will remain high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical medical program ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's medical programs in Henan Province in 2026 is approximately 42619, with a fluctuation range of 42119 to 43119. The significant expansion in 2026 will cause the ranking to expand compared to 2025, but the sustained high popularity of medical programs will partially offset the expansion effect, preventing the ranking from fully returning to the low levels before expansion.
